name: Ajay Kochhar
background: Co-founder of Li-Cycle and has served as President, CEO and a director since the company's inception in 2016. Before Li-Cycle, he worked at Hatch in the industrial and clean tech sectors.

company_affiliations.name: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, President, and Chief Executive Officer; Director
